title: Govt nod to 52 applications in textile PLI
description: The government has approved 52 new textile applications under the PLI Scheme. These companies will invest Rs 6,708 crore. This initiative aims to boost domestic manufacturing and innovation. It will strengthen India's global textile market position. The scheme supports manmade fibre apparel, fabrics, and technical textiles. This move is set to enhance production capabilities across the sector.
